code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut product = 1
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut current = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has_digit = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
    if has_digit
      product = product * sign * current
      current = 0
      sign = 1
      has_digit = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
  else if b == 43
    sign = 1
  else
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digit = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_digit
  product = product * sign * current
end

println("product=#{product}")
